name: Seed Rate Calculator
description: Industrial-grade seed rate calculator for precision agriculture, incorporating ISO 5692, Six Sigma DMAIC, and Lean principles to optimize planting density, minimize waste, and maximize yield.

inputs.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Desired final stand count per hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired final stand count per hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Agronomik önerilere ve verim hedeflerine dayalı olarak hektar başına istenen nihai bitki sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschter Endbestand pro Hektar basierend auf agronomischen Empfehlungen und Ertragszielen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre final de pieds souhaité par hectare, basé sur les recommandations agronomiques et les objectifs de rendement.

inputs.label: Germination Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimal koşullar altında çimlenmesi beklenen tohum yüzdesi, tipik olarak tohum partisi analizinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Samen, die unter optimalen Bedingungen keimen, typischerweise aus der Saatgutanalyse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de semences censées germer dans des conditions optimales, généralement issu de l'analyse du lot de semences.

inputs.label: Field Emergence Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çimlenen tohumların sağlıklı fide olarak çıkması beklenen yüzde, toprak koşulları, zararlılar ve hava durumu dikkate alınarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Prozentsatz der gekeimten Samen, die als gesunde Sämlinge auflaufen, unter Berücksichtigung von Bodenbedingungen, Schädlingen und Wetter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu de semences germées qui émergent en plantules saines, tenant compte des conditions du sol, des ravageurs et de la météo.

inputs.label: Seed Weight (g per 1000 seeds)
inputs.businessContext: Thousand kernel weight (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, used to convert seed count to mass.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thousand kernel weight (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, used to convert seed count to mass.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tohum tedarikçisinden veya laboratuvar testinden bin tane ağırlığı (BTA), tohum sayısını kütleye dönüştürmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tausendkorngewicht (TKG) vom Saatgutlieferanten oder aus dem Labor, zur Umrechnung von Samenzahl in Masse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de mille grains (PMG) du fournisseur de semences ou d'un test en laboratoire, utilisé pour convertir le nombre de semences en masse.

inputs.label: Row Spacing (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekim sıraları arasındaki mesafe, tipik olarak ekim makinesi konfigürasyonu ve ürün tipine göre belirlenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen den Pflanzreihen, typischerweise durch die Sämaschinenkonfiguration und die Kulturart festgelegt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre les rangs de plantation, généralement définie par la configuration du semoir et le type de culture.

inputs.label: Planter Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Operational efficiency of the planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Operational efficiency of the planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekim makinesinin atlama, çift ekim ve mekanik kayıpları hesaba katan operasyonel verimliliği (Yalın OEE metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebseffizienz der Sämaschine unter Berücksichtigung von Auslassungen, Doppelbelegungen und mechanischen Verlusten (Lean OEE-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité opérationnelle du semoir tenant compte des sauts, des doubles et des pertes mécaniques (métrique OEE Lean).

inputs.label: Seed Cost per Unit ($/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price of seed per kilogram, used for economic analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price of seed per kilogram, used for economic analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tohumun kilogram başına satın alma fiyatı, ekonomik analiz için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kaufpreis des Saatguts pro Kilogramm, für wirtschaftliche Analysen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix d'achat des semences par kilogramme, utilisé pour l'analyse économique.

inputs.label: Expected Yield Value ($/tonne)
inputs.businessContext: Market price per tonne of harvested crop, used for ROI calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market price per tonne of harvested crop, used for ROI calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasat edilen ürünün ton başına piyasa fiyatı, yatırım getirisi hesaplamaları için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Marktpreis pro Tonne der geernteten Kultur, für ROI-Berechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix du marché par tonne de récolte, utilisé pour les calculs de retour sur investissement.

rules.message: Germination rate should not be lower than field emergence factor. Check input values.
Target population outside typical range for most row crops. Verify agronomic recommendation.
Narrow rows with low planter efficiency may cause significant seed spacing variability.

thresholds.message: Germination rate below 80%: consider seed treatment or replanting plan.
Seed cost exceeds $20/kg: evaluate economic viability with ROI analysis.
Planter efficiency below 85%: perform Six Sigma root cause analysis to reduce losses.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
